local_sources: Incoming client folders, fiscal documents, invoices, notices, scans and email files

codex_context.purpose: Prepare the studio intake synthesis and document requests
codex_context.content: Generated inventory, structured fields, formal-check results, extraction diagnostics and selected document passages
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Use generated evidence and selected passages; consult an original document only when its meaning or context cannot be established from the extraction

codex_context.purpose: Draft a reviewable request for missing or unclear evidence
codex_context.content: Missing-item list, case context needed for clarity and selected supporting facts
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Use only facts required to explain the request and do not reproduce unrelated client data

residual_risks.risk: Structured fields and selected passages can contain direct identifiers and fiscal information
residual_risks.mitigation: Keep the complete folder local and limit Codex to extracted results and passages necessary for intake synthesis

commercialista_notice.message_it: La cartella cliente viene inventariata, letta e controllata localmente. Codex riceve i risultati strutturati e, quando serve interpretarli, i soli passaggi pertinenti dei documenti.
commercialista_notice.message_en: The client folder is inventoried, read and checked locally. Codex receives structured results and, when interpretation is needed, only the relevant document passages.

limitations: Document diversity can require additional passages during professional review
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
